top_signals.title: Commission disburses €3.9 billion for drones under the €90 billion Ukraine Support Loan
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 30 Jun 2026 The European Commission begins disbursement today of €3.9 billion as the first payment under the first tranche of around €6 billion dedicated to drone procurement, a key capability enabling Ukraine to withstand Russia's war of aggression.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fortuna lifts West Africa growth with $1B Senegal gold project
top_signals.summary: "Diamba Sud's feasibility study is slightly better than our prior forecast," BMO analyst says.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Solar generation in CAISO surpassed natural gas in the first five months of 2026
top_signals.summary: In the first five months of 2026, utility-scale solar generation surpassed natural gas generation in CAISO. Solar electricity generation in the California Independent System Operator (CAISO) over the first five months of 2026 increased 21% compared with the same period in 2024, and natural gas generation decreased by 60%, data from our Hourly Electric Grid Monitor shows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Fake Perplexity extension on Chrome Web Store tracked searches
top_signals.summary: A malicious extension in the Chrome Web Store is masquerading as the Perplexity AI answer engine, intercepting search traffic and collecting browsing information. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Commission clarifies rules on plastic bottles recycling
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 30 Jun 2026 The European Commission today adopted new rules on recycling of single-use plastic beverage bottles made primarily of polyethylene terephthalate (PET bottles).

top_signals.title: Atlantic Strategic confirms viability, 12-month pathway for monazite processing plant
top_signals.summary: The project would initially begin with a demonstration plant capable of producing 1,000 tonnes per annum of monazite concentrate.
